Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user has provided a pseudo BPMN representation of a business process and asked me to redesign it to optimize for reduced turnaround times and increased flexibility for non standard requests

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To optimize this process for faster turnaround and better flexibility with non standard requests Id redesign it around early predictive routing tighter automation loops and dynamic resource allocation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The core idea is to front load intelligence so that most requests get handled quickly without hitting manual bottlenecks or repeated re evaluations

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Start by inserting a lightweight predictive classification task right after the initial Receive Customer Request step

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Using a simple ML model trained on historical request data this task scores the request on three axes likelihood its standard vs custom probability it will need manager approval and estimated chance of rejection or re work
